title: Special Armors and Tools + Horse Armors
description: bone, emerald, blaze, ender and obsidian armor and tools, now with horse armors
body:
Special Armor & Tool Sets
*Now with New Horse Armors
Bone, Emerald, Ender, Obsidian and Blaze/Fire

Crafting

A full set of each armor needs 24 pieces of that material, just like the vanilla armor sets.
Bone armor and tools are crafted from Bones
Emerald armor and tools are crafted from Emeralds
-can be smelted down into emerald shards, 9 shards makes an Emerald
Ender armor and tools are crafted from Ender Pearls
-also has ender fragment for recycling armor and tools
Obsidian armor and tools are crafted from Obsidian Ingots
-Obsidian Ingots are obtained by smelting Obsidian blocks
-also has obsidian shard for recycling armor and tools
Fire armor and tools are crafted from Blaze Rods
